items.description: Research and compile a list of commonly used WiFi penetration testing tools, including Aircrack-ng and Kismet.
Identify the key features and functionalities of each tool on the list.
Gather sources and references for each tool's information to ensure credibility.
Organize the findings into a structured report format.
